blockerNotes: Deal execution, persistent identity, MFA, separate PostgreSQL runtime principals, 12-role/19-command recovery and isolated backup/restore are merged and green. The current outbox relay is still process-memory-led and performs best-effort PostgreSQL updates; the bank callback accepts only one static configured key; production reconciliation and provider recovery remain unproven. The next layer must replace these gaps without changing UI or claiming live bank integration.

readiness: 91% honest architectural and isolated-runtime readiness. Canonical execution, persistent identity, separate DB principals and backup/restore are proven in isolated PostgreSQL. Durable financial delivery, live integrations, production deployment, provider recovery and scale remain unproven. Production exploitation remains NO-GO.
